hooks.prompt: A Write or Edit tool call is about to happen. Check the file path. Does it contain a plugin source folder? Look for patterns like 'src-magneto/', 'src-aule/', 'src-the-one-ring/', 'src-gaudi/', or any 'src-[plugin-name]/' pattern inside a Plugins/ directory. If YES — a plugin source file is about to be directly edited. BLOCK this action and respond: 'Direct edits to plugin source files are not permitted outside the /update-plugin workflow. This keeps all changes audited, verified, and properly repackaged. Run /update-plugin [plugin-name] to make changes through the guided workflow — it will audit the plugin, walk you through the changes, run the full verifier, and repackage automatically. If you genuinely need to bypass this (e.g. you are mid-workflow and this is an approved fix), say "bypass plugin guard" and the edit will proceed.' If the user responds with 'bypass plugin guard': approve the action and note it internally as a bypassed guard — do not block again for the remainder of this session for the same plugin. If the file path is NOT a plugin source folder, approve the action immediately and silently.

A file was just written or edited. First check if the path contains a plugin source folder: 'Plugins/gaudi/src-gaudi', 'Plugins/the-one-ring/src-the-one-ring', 'Plugins/magneto/src-magneto', 'Plugins/aule/src-aule', etc. If YES — a plugin source changed. Automatically invoke the aule-plugin-repackager skill with: 'A plugin source file was just modified at [file path]. Repackage the affected plugin and verify the .zip is in sync.' If NO, then check if the file path contains any of these Aule core files: 'skills/plugin-generation', 'skills/plugin-discovery', 'agents/plugin-builder', 'commands/', 'references/olytic-patterns', 'references/component-templates', 'references/agentic-best-practices', 'references/telemetry-template'. If YES — an Aule standard has changed. Automatically invoke the trashbot agent with this message: 'Aule was just updated ([file path that changed]). Run trashbot to sweep all other plugins and bring them up to the new standards.' If NEITHER — check if the file path contains 'olytic-core/contracts/schemas/' or 'olytic-core/contracts/protocols/'. If YES — a shared contract has changed inside olytic-core. Automatically invoke the aule-change-analyzer skill with: 'A contracts file was just modified at [file path]. Categorize this as a Schema Change (Category 3) and route to aule-skill-updater and trashbot.' If NO — the file is not an Aule standard or schema contract, no action needed.

The user is asking to run trashbot or sweep all plugins. Invoke the trashbot agent immediately. Do not ask clarifying questions — trashbot is designed to run autonomously. Say: 'Running trashbot — auditing all plugins in the workspace against current Aule standards.'
